texto: There are two kinds of truth
autor: The truth that lights the way and the truth that warms the heart. The fist of these is science and the second is art.
explicacao: Citação de The truth that lights the way and the truth that warms the heart. The fist of these is science and the second is art. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There are two kinds of truth” articula reflexao, raymond-chandler, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
